title: thymbra spicata subsp. intricata
intro: Thymbra spicata subsp. intricata, also known as Creeping Thyme, is a low-growing, flowering herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Its medicinal properties are primarily attributed to its essential oils, which exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Creeping Thyme include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support respiratory health. Creeping Thyme is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and can be consumed fresh or dried to harness its medicinal properties.
